channel.title: YouTube on TechWave Hub
channel.description: Recent content in YouTube on TechWave Hub

item.title: How to Start a YouTube Channel in 2026: A Complete Beginner's Guide
item.description: Want to start a YouTube channel in 2026? This complete beginner's guide covers everything from setup to monetization.

item.title: YouTube: The Company, the Founders, and the Story Behind the World's Biggest Video Platform
item.description: Who owns YouTube? Learn everything about YouTube, its founders Chad Hurley, Steve Chen, and Jawed Karim, and how it became the world's biggest video platform.
